rawContent:
Tweet by @thsottiaux (Tibo)
Author bio: Codex & ChatGPT @OpenAI
Text: Codex can see and set its own /goal. Everything we build, we build also as a tool for the agent. This is a generalization of meta prompting, where you let the agent set its own task based on your intent. https://t.co/8xyjRjFk4v
